evaluation.test_case: Phase 3 exploration outputs storage in GitHub

output_1.name: Exploration summary
output_1.purpose: Primary durable record of codebase exploration findings

output_2.name: files.csv artifact subissue
output_2.body_format: references/artifact-schema.md template with fenced csv block
output_2.closed_when: Phase 3 step 7 — file ledger is complete
output_2.purpose: Machine-readable resumable file list for later phases

output_3.name: open-questions artifact subissue
output_3.body_format: references/artifact-schema.md template with markdown table or checklist
output_3.kept_open_until: Phase 5 — every question is finalized or marked needs-human
output_3.purpose: Durable question ledger across research and clarification phases

exploration_phase_issue.description: Exploration summary with findings and high-level snapshots

steps: Create the Exploration phase issue with gh issue create
Attach it to parent issue using GraphQL addSubIssue mutation
Attach files.csv to Exploration phase issue using GraphQL mutation
Attach open-questions to Exploration phase issue using GraphQL mutation

non_negotiable_rule.text: Phase 0 is the only phase that writes durable repo-local workflow artifacts. For Phases 1–11, GitHub parent issues, phase issues, artifact subissues, and issue comments are the canonical workflow record; do not create .coding-workflow/work/<slug>/... artifacts.

benefits: Resumability: fresh session loads entire state from GitHub alone
Auditability: all findings visible in GitHub history
Collaboration: multiple agents read and update same artifacts
Durability: issues remain after workflow session ends
Traceability: each issue has permanent URL for linking

evaluation_result.finding: Phase 3 exploration outputs are stored as three separate GitHub issues: (1) exploration summary phase issue, (2) files.csv artifact subissue, (3) open-questions artifact subissue. All are linked via sub-issue relationships and persisted in GitHub, not in local files. open-questions remains open through Phase 5 as a durable ledger; the other two close after Phase 3.
evaluation_result.rationale: The specification is explicit across multiple canonical references (workflow.md, issue-hierarchy.md, artifact-schema.md, templates). The GitHub-native storage is a non-negotiable rule enforced consistently.
